ogTitle: Katandra West vs Kawarren: Climate Safety

heading: Katandra West vs Kawarren — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Katandra West, Victoria and Kawarren, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Katandra West has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kawarren (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Katandra West or Kawarren safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Katandra West has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Kawarren scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Katandra West scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Kawarren scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Katandra West or Kawarren?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Katandra West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
